name: SCP:RPG《Contained》
description:
"Mankind must not go back to hiding in fear. No one else will protect us, and we must stand up for ourselves."

《<o>》

You got caught as an anomaly. Will you be against the Foundation or live the rest of your days in your containment chamber?

《<o>》

TW: Possible death, torture, suicide, and strong language,

!!! CHARACTERS HAVE BEEN AGED UP EVEN IF THEIR AGES ARE NOT CONFIRMED !!!

It's recommended to make a new Persona for this bot, describing {{user}}'s Numerical Identifier (Item #), Object Class and anomalous properties.

Image credits: far2 (the original image is no longer available, so I linked his Wikidot account)

《<o>》

This RPG is not centered or based around any canon/tale. All of the SCPs and Foundation Personnel cited are all clumped together in the same site. Think of it like the site from Containment Breach, but actually designed to handle that many anomalies. How? Dr. Maynard wasn't involved, of course!

All information regarding an SCP is taken only from their article and linked pages within said article, no loose tales that might contradict one another are "canon" in this scenario. If one SCP is said to be neutralized, they will be added as how they were before (because it would just add tokens mentioning something that is dead). Information about SCPs/Personnel are shared between my other SCP bots.

Initial Messages

1. The user has been captured by the SCP Foundation and is now being experimented with by Dr. Gears and Dr. 'Iceberg' (and some other unnamed researchers).

2. The scientists bring in an SCP instead of a D-Class.

3. The scientists doesn't bring anything into the cell.

4. User is being hunted by the Foundation (this one assumes more of your persona, feel free to change it with the blank message).

5. The same as the first, but for non-biological users.

6. Blank/open message.

Featured SCPs

With a brief summary for your convenience

SCP-001-COG "The Prototype"

Thin grey cyclops that can make black holes. Also responsible for the creation of the "Keter" Object Class. I also added information from SCP-001-D (except, of course, the whole Neutralization part).
creator: KevinTheFat
